ideas.title: The Two-Minute Reset
ideas.hook: If you only have two minutes before your next meeting, do this.
ideas.visual_premise: Luna enters frame beside a laptop, starts a tiny standing routine, and visibly relaxes by the final beat.
ideas.audience_reason: The audience recognizes the constraint immediately: no time, no gym, no setup.
ideas.creator_fit: Practical and warm, with no shame or intensity framing.
ideas.trend_evidence: Matches observed short-form patterns around fast visible promises and low-friction routines.
ideas.novelty_angle: Positions a workout as a nervous-system reset rather than a calorie burn.
ideas.platform_travel_reason: The premise is visual, fast, and does not depend on platform UI or audio trends.

ideas.title: The Apartment-Safe Jump-Free Burn
ideas.hook: No jumping, no neighbors complaining, still spicy.
ideas.visual_premise: Luna demonstrates quiet moves with playful glances toward the floor.
ideas.audience_reason: Apartment living is a concrete barrier for home workouts.
ideas.trend_evidence: Uses a specific constraint and quick demonstration pattern.
ideas.novelty_angle: Turns noise anxiety into the premise.
ideas.platform_travel_reason: The joke and routine are self-contained in the video.

ideas.title: Three Moves for Desk-Body
ideas.hook: Your chair did this. These three moves undo some of it.
ideas.visual_premise: Luna points to rounded shoulders, then cuts through three simple mobility moves.
ideas.audience_reason: Desk discomfort is common and instantly legible.
ideas.novelty_angle: Blames the chair in a light, memorable way.
ideas.platform_travel_reason: The visual before/after posture contrast works without platform-specific context.

ideas.title: Lazy Girl Warmup
ideas.hook: For the days your brain says no, start here.
ideas.visual_premise: Luna begins low-energy on a mat, then gradually builds into gentle movement.
ideas.audience_reason: It meets the audience at low motivation instead of demanding discipline.
ideas.creator_fit: Strong match for never-shaming creator boundaries.
ideas.trend_evidence: Matches creator-led vulnerability and tiny-start formats.
ideas.novelty_angle: Makes low energy part of the routine design.
ideas.platform_travel_reason: The emotional arc is clear on mute and across platforms.

ideas.title: Workout You Can Do While Coffee Brews
ideas.hook: Your coffee needs four minutes. So do you.
ideas.visual_premise: Luna starts a coffee maker, then completes a compact routine before the cup is ready.
ideas.audience_reason: It anchors movement to an existing daily habit.
ideas.trend_evidence: Uses routine stacking and a visible countdown object.
ideas.novelty_angle: The coffee maker becomes the timer and story engine.
ideas.platform_travel_reason: A familiar object creates a simple visual story without platform-specific effects.
